since_last: 40% of 101 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.59%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.89% · BTC -0.88% · Gold +1.26% · Nasdaq100 +1.93%. 40% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.59%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.59%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.77%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +16.00%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +16.00%, DELL +4.15%, OKLO +3.69%, DV +2.74%, HPE +2.33%. Laggards: SKHY -5.50%, AMBA -3.20%, LRCX -3.09%, TER -2.95%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.15% at $124.96
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
